creator: marc.vanwoerkom@science-factory.com
text:
The institute that hosts molden was rechristened into "cmbi".

Fix: 

The links in the port have to be updated to point from

	    ftp://ftp.caos.kun.nl/pub/molgraph/molden
            http://www.caos.kun.nl/~schaft/molden/molden.html

        to:
	    ftp://ftp.cmbi.kun.nl/pub/molgraph/molden
            http://www.cmbi.nl/~schaft/molden/molden.html

	Regards,
	Marc
